page_metadata.biotools__summary: BBrowser allows biologists to handle scRNA-seq data without programming knowledge. Intuitive operation. Functions are updated. It has a new CITE-seq dashboard, a complete package for interactively exploring single-cell gene expression data in parallel with surface protein information.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: BBrowser allows biologists to handle scRNA-seq data without programming knowledge. Intuitive operation. Functions are updated. It has a new CITE-seq dashboard, a complete package for interactively exploring single-cell gene expression data in parallel with surface protein information.
